scores.notes: The OCR output has minor character errors in the company name and address, such as 'D. T. Y. SM1 SUN 000' instead of 'D.I.Y. (M) SDN BHD' and '101 1251 A & 1051-B' instead of 'LOT 1851-A & 1851-B'. The date and total are correctly extracted. The overall structure and layout are well preserved.
